content: {"question":"What is the incremental cost-effectiveness ratio (ICER) of intermittent fasting versus metformin and GLP-1 agonists for type 2 diabetes prevention, measured in cost per QALY gained over a 10-year horizon?","search_queries":["intermittent fasting cost-effectiveness analysis type 2 diabetes QALY","Markov model dietary intervention metformin GLP-1 agonist diabetes prevention ICER","time-restricted eating workplace absenteeism productivity loss economic impact","insurance reimbursement intermittent fasting medical nutrition therapy CPT codes","budget impact analysis lifestyle intervention diabetes payer savings 10-year horizon"],"perspective":"Economic"}
